# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.example.com
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_INTERNAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - db.example.com
  ports:
    - number: 3306
      name: mysql
      protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_INTERNAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: third-party-api-vs
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*"
  gateways:
    - mesh
  http:
    - route:
      - destination:
          host: third-party-api
          port:
            number: 443
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-database-vs
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*"
  gateways:
    - mesh
  tls:
    mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
  http:
    - route:
      - destination:
          host: external-database
          port:
            number: 3306
